_comment: Pulse events — cron-based prompts posted to inbox

events.name: watchdog
events.prompt: Check for stalled states, crashed PIDs, and dirty workspace. Report any issues.

events.name: github_activity
events.prompt: Check GitHub PRs and issues for activity. Use gh CLI. Summarize changes.

events.name: plan_review
events.prompt: Review progress against PLAN.md. Are we on track? Any blockers?
